title: System Design & Architecture Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — software architecture foundations, the system design process and capacity estimation, performance/scalability/reliability fundamentals, networking and communication for architects, API design, data and database architecture, caching and CDN, messaging and event-driven communication, distributed systems theory and algorithms, architectural styles, microservices, event-driven architecture with event sourcing/CQRS, Domain-Driven Design, clean/hexagonal/onion architecture, software and enterprise integration patterns, resilience and fault tolerance, security and zero-trust architecture, observability architecture, multi-region/edge architecture, frontend/backend/data/AI-ML system design, real-time and specialized architectures, system-design interview case studies, architecture documentation, governance and evolutionary architecture, frontier trends, and the architect's career. Tool-specific topics (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD tools, IaC tools, individual cloud services, language stacks, AI agents, databases) live in their dedicated subjects.

stages.title: System Design Foundations
stages.summary: What system design is, why architecture matters, core engineering principles.
